g.text: REST API framework + auto OpenAPI docs
Async calls to Ollama / cloud LLM
Role: GP (own chats). Admin can access all.
Role: Specialist only (Admin also has access)
RAG Service Internal API (port 8001 — called by Backend only)
External APIs consumed: Ollama (local) · Med42-70B via RunPod (cloud) · SMTP (Mailpit / Gmail)
Auth: RAG_INTERNAL_API_KEY shared secret between Backend and RAG Service containers

svg.text: All backend endpoints require JWT unless marked public
